title: senecio collinus
intro: Senecio collinus, also known as Mountain Ragwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Senecio collinus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of digestive problems. Senecio collinus is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
